title: ornus ornus
intro: Ornus ornus, also known as the mastic tree, is a deciduous shrub native to the Mediterranean region, producing small white flowers and red berries. The bark and leaves of the Ornus ornus plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Ornus ornus include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve oral health, and boost the immune system. Ornus ornus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or extract, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
